ddls:
CREATE TABLE "panels" (
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each panel configuration */,
  "header" TEXT /* Title of the panel displayed in the UI */,
  "key" TEXT /* Unique key identifying the panel from among its siblings */,
  "disabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the panel is disabled */,
  "force_render" INTEGER /* Indicates if the panel should force render content */,
  "show_arrow" INTEGER /* Indicates if the panel should show an arrow icon */,
  "version" REAL /* Version of the panel configuration */,
  "lazy_render" INTEGER /* Indicates if the panel should render lazily */,
  "render_immediately" INTEGER /* Indicates if the panel should render immediately */,
  "hide_header" INTEGER /* Indicates if the panel's header should be hidden */,
  "custom_css" TEXT /* Custom CSS styles for the panel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("panel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "panel_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the panel associated with this version */,
  "version_number" REAL /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_panel_versions_panel_id FOREIGN KEY ("panel_id") REFERENCES panels ("panel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_panel_versions_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "panel_usage_logs" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage log entry */,
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the panel being used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the panel */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the panel was accessed */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the panel usage in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_panel_usage_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_panel_usage_logs_panel_id FOREIGN KEY ("panel_id") REFERENCES panels ("panel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, designer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the setting (e.g., boolean, string, integer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "panel_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test entry */,
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the panel being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "tester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tester conducting the test */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the test was conducted (e.g., local, staging, production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_panel_tests_panel_id FOREIGN KEY ("panel_id") REFERENCES panels ("panel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_panel_tests_tester_id FOREIGN KEY ("tester_id") REFERENCES testers ("tester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testers" (
  "tester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tester */,
  "tester_name" TEXT /* Full name of the tester */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the tester */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the tester belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the panel the feedback is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text content of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_panel_id FOREIGN KEY ("panel_id") REFERENCES panels ("panel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "panel_settings_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the panel whose settings were changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of what was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, delete, insert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_panel_settings_history_panel_id FOREIGN KEY ("panel_id") REFERENCES panels ("panel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_panel_settings_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "panel_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency entry */,
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the panel that has dependencies */,
  "dependent_panel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the panel that is dependent */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., layout, data, functional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_panel_dependencies_dependent_panel_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_panel_id") REFERENCES panels ("panel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_panel_dependencies_panel_id FOREIGN KEY ("panel_id") REFERENCES panels ("panel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "panel_performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the panel the metric is for */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., load_time, render_time) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_panel_performance_metrics_panel_id FOREIGN KEY ("panel_id") REFERENCES panels ("panel_id")
)
